COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR.aromaPrinciple: [sine][purple]Everything is mine. Everything will be mine. [jitter]Everything.[/jitter][/purple][/sine]
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR.cardsModifierDescrip: Collector cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR.description:
The notorious Sorceress of the City.
Claims souls and trinkets alike.
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR.eventDeathPrevention: My collection is not yet complete.
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR.goldMonologue: [sine]Such wealth... it will make a fine addition to my collection...[/sine][/sine]
COLLECTOR-COLLECTOR.title: The Collector
